control.connected: Can manage the shared timer and settings.
control.connecting: Starting or joining the shared timer with manage access.

readonly.connected: Joined the shared timer without manage access.
readonly.connecting: Joining the shared timer and waiting for the first sync.
readonly.connectedNoController: Viewing the last shared timer state while waiting for a manager.

descriptions.failed: Automatic recovery failed. Retry to reconnect.
descriptions.recovered: Connection recovered. The timer is live again.
descriptions.reconnecting: Trying to reconnect to the shared timer.

connectionSummary.joinedWithOthers: Joined with {count, plural, one {# other participant} other {# other participants}}
connectionSummary.managingWithOthers: Managing with {count, plural, one {# other participant} other {# other participants}}
